svg.title: Tura GUI CI quality checks command run demo
svg.desc: Animated SVG demo of the Tura GUI conversation page with the command inspector adding and running commands.

g.text: Help me run the lint and formatter steps in the GitHub CI workflow
I’ll inspect the GitHub workflow to identify the exact lint/format
commands, run those locally, then patch only the failures they expose.
Finish line is boring: CI-equivalent lint/format green, with the changed files
